title: Korbond 320m Sewing Thread –2 x 160m Spools - Silver & Gold Polyester – Hand and Machine Sewing
features: LARGE PACK: This set contains a total of 320m of Professional Thread (2 x 160m Spools)

POLYESTER MATERIAL: Korbond Polyester Thread is designed for heavy duty use, it has a lot of give while retaining its shape and has excellent colour fastness, retaining its bright colour through more washes than cotton alternatives.
LOW FRICTION: The Korbond Professional Thread Selection are specially wound onto a spindle in production to reduce needle friction and deterioration when sewing.
MULTI USE: Suitable for both hand and machine sewing, the abrasion resistant thread creates strong seams.
CHOOSE FROM 14 COLOURS: Select the perfect shade for your project from Korbond’s range of 14 threads, including bright and bold colours in addition to pastel hues and muted tones.
description: From the manufacturer The Korbond range of Polyester Threads, available in a range of colour choices, provide ‘no shrinkage’ and excellent colour fastness. POLYESTER Polyester Thread is suitable for most projects, providing some elasticity, it is suitable for constructing garments that will be worn and washed time and time again. PREMIUM THREAD Korbond Core Thread boasts 'no shrinkage' and excellent colour fastness, meaning once applied to a garment or project, it will help to hold the desired shape and will never lose it's bright colour. RANGE OF COLOURS With 14 stunning colours to choose from, the Korbond range of thread has a perfect shade for any project and any fabric. 320m PER PACK Each pack contains two 160m Threads in the colour of your choice making it a huge 320m of premium Sewing Thread!
